title: ptilagrostis mongholica subsp. porteri
intro: Ptilagrostis mongholica subsp. porteri, also known as Porter's grama or blue grama, is a type of grass native to the western United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Ptilagrostis mongholica subsp. porteri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
